column3: ...Haaah. It's gotten quite cold out lately.
Look at that mannequin. Isn't it kind of cute?
I bet you'd look good in that knit cap.
You can poke your head out a bit more.
Perfect. I'm sure anyone looking will think you're just a doll...
...and I'd deal with any trouble anyway, so don't worry.
You can see the mirror okay from there, can't you?
...Hey. Do you know much about fashion?
Well, you're always wearing the same hoodie.
...I'm thinking of wearing earrings when I go out from now on.
But I don't know what to pick myself...
Won't you pick something with me?

column1: #「ピンク」→「メタル」→「なし（すごい気を使う必要あり）」→（循環）

column3: It's understated, but it's still a little girly.
A magazine I read said that cute styles are the most appealing.
Hm, maybe I'll go with this one?
The metal might look a bit harsh, but that's what gives it style.
...So? What do you think? Look cool?
I guess cool styles match me better, just like I thought.
Hm... Maybe I'll choose this one?
Why are you making that face?
Oh, you're concentrating so hard for me. Want to look at them again?
...Why do you think we even came here?
Be honest. Are you really okay not seeing me with earrings on?
Let's go through them again. Though I'm glad I got to hear that.
If you're that sure, I won't buy any earrings today.
I'll go buy that outfit from earlier instead.
Let's head out then, Rin. You can hide in my hair for now...
Thank you, Rin. It's fun shopping with someone.
I'll go pay. You can hide in my hair for now...
